历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 10086 → 10327 → 12526 → 16864 → 15673, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 5000 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 15673, slightly higher than 2024 but still at a high level; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 32 → 33 → 33 → 37 → 40, continuously expanding; the 2026 plan is 38, a decrease of 2 from 2025 (a 5% reduction), easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked 57th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, up from 65th in 2021, showing steady improvement in comprehensive strength and reputation; the 2025 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving a teacher ethics incident (professor assessment controversy), which may slightly affect application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 73rd, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure; no obvious record of enrollment gaps; Law is A-level (one of the Five Academies and Four Schools), Applied Economics is A-, with significant disciplinary advantages in finance, economics, and law, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information are socially popular, but the university mainly focuses on finance, economics, and law, with fewer engineering majors; Law major popularity is divided and wait-and-see, Finance/Economics majors are also divided and wait-and-see; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is about 137,000, a decrease of about 1.8% from 2025, easing competition slightly, with an overall stable and slight decline; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region; Chongqing examinees have a high recognition of Wuhan universities, with no obvious negative signals regarding regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical backward trend of rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (5%), the slight decrease in provincial examinees, and the continuous rise in university ranking, competition is expected to ease slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 15673; the predicted minimum ranking is about 15253, with a range of 14753–15753.
